summary: Tested all key endpoints after server.py refactoring (extraction of middleware.py, startup.py, websocket_routes.py, webhook_routes.py). All 21 backend API tests pass (100%). All 7 frontend UI tests pass (100%). The refactoring was successful with no broken functionality.

issues: WebSocket 'closed before connection established' warning in console on navigation - expected browser behavior, not a bug

frontend_tests.test: Homepage loads with Big Mann Entertainment branding
Login flow works with owner credentials
Navigation bar visible with all menu items
Comment section visible on content cards (data-testid='comment-section')

refactoring_verified.middleware.py: Performance tracking, security headers, rate limiting - all working
refactoring_verified.startup.py: Database indexes, external services initialization - working
refactoring_verified.webhook_routes.py: POST /api/webhook/stripe - returns 400 without signature as expected
refactoring_verified.notification_routes.py: All CRUD operations + WebSocket manager - working
refactoring_verified.auth_routes.py: Login, register, me, refresh - all working

critical_code_review_comments: server.py reduced to ~156 lines as expected
All route modules properly imported and registered
Middleware correctly applied via app.middleware('http') pattern
Startup/shutdown events correctly wired via app.on_event decorators
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server.py refactoring complete and verified. All extracted modules (middleware.py, startup.py, websocket_routes.py, webhook_routes.py) are working correctly. The app has 21 route modules in /app/backend/routes/ plus external routers in router_setup.py. Key test file: test_server_refactoring_regression.py covers health, auth, content, analytics, notifications, messages, webhook, and websocket endpoints.
